title: Clear Glass Apothecary Jars, Diamond Star Large Candy Buffet Display, Elegant Storage Jar, Decorative Wedding Candy Organizer Canisters (Height: 15.5" Body: 6.5"; 64 FL.OZ)
description:
About this item
SIZE AND CAPACITY: The size of this apothecary jar glass is 15.5 inches (height) x 6.5 inches (body) and the capacity is approximately 64 fl.oz. Due to our high-quality craftsmanship, our glass candy jars have high transparency, which can help you quickly determine the status of the items stored in the apothecary jars glass.
HANDBLOWN GLASS JAR: This candy jars for candy buffet is made of sturdy high quality hand-blown clear glass. Due to the handmade process it may contain air bubbles and slight variations. These imperfections are a normal phenomen.
DECORATIVE GLASS JAR: These classic style footed glass apothecary jars with lid are great for displaying decorative spheres, flowers, sand, pine cones, or any other item you wish to coordinate with your decor. These look great together and can add a cheerful energy to your environment.
ELEGANT DESIGN: These decor jars are ideal decorations for various events, such as weddings, birthday parties, Christmas and other special occasions. In addition, our glass canister with lid has a certain storage space, making it not only a decoration but also a practical storage container.
GUARANTEED: If there are problems with apothecary candy jars quality and transportation damage, you can enjoy unconditional return and refund serivce .Do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions.
